title: Figure / Diagram Controlled Cycle Closure and Reuse Handoff

placement_logic.location_strategy: Inserted after AG11C infographic block so the conceptual service flow is followed by a relationship/feedback-loop diagram.
placement_logic.mobile_behavior: responsive SVG image width with auto height; static audit completed in AG11D

nodes.label: Public need
nodes.description: Citizen or patient experience creates a service signal.

nodes.label: Digital signal
nodes.description: Need, feedback or service status becomes visible.

nodes.label: Service response
nodes.description: Facility or programme action is coordinated.

nodes.label: Trust feedback
nodes.description: Outcome visibility strengthens the next service loop.

title_label_pattern.title: Public healthcare digital feedback loop
title_label_pattern.node_label_rule: Each node uses a short governance/service phrase with a one-line explanatory description.
title_label_pattern.edge_rule: Edges show conceptual flow direction only, not a formal official workflow.
title_label_pattern.no_official_workflow_claim_rule: Do not present this conceptual loop as a statutory or official operational process.

caption_credit_pattern.caption: Conceptual diagram showing how public need, digital signals, triage, service response and trust feedback can reinforce healthcare delivery.
caption_credit_pattern.visible_credit: Diagram: Drishvara. Source: article-derived conceptual synthesis.

future_reuse_conditions: Use only where a feedback-loop or relationship diagram improves understanding.
Do not imply official workflow unless source-backed.
Keep node labels short for mobile readability.
Retain caption, source note, visible credit and alt text.
Re-audit placement and mobile layout after insertion.
